caption: A man wearing a white dress shirt, tan suspenders, a red bowtie, and a grey pointed wig is speaking into a microphone. He wears glasses and over-ear headphones. He is situated in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio, with mannequins, racks of clothes, and framed photographs visible in the background. A professional microphone stands in front of him, and a logo on the screen reads "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking and subtly moving his head and mouth. The background remains static, and the on-screen logos do not change. The frames capture a continuous moment of him talking, with slight variations in his facial expression and the position of his jaw as he speaks.
